info.name: NextGen Catalog API
Records
Get records by using url parameters to perform a catalog search.

params.name: q
params.description: A search query string which accepts boolean operators (AND, OR, NOT), wildcards (*), and exact phrases ("").

params.name: page
params.description: Page number of the paginated result set in which to return.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results returned for each page of paginated data.

params.name: searchAfter
params.description:
Enables deep pagination to retrieve records beyond the first 10,000 results.  Not compatible with sort, or page parameters.

For the inital request use `searchAfter=`* and for all subsequent requests set `searchAfter` to the value of the sort array in the last member of `body.hits.hits` for each page.

params.name: sourceIncludes
params.description: Limits the response by specifying which fields from `_source.record` should be included in the response.

params.name: title
params.description: A title search string used to search for a record. Matches record.title fields within decsription records and record.heading fields within authority records.

params.name: title_is
params.description: An exact title of a record. Fully matches record.title fields within description records and record.heading fields within authority records.

params.name: naId
params.description: An array of NARA-specific identifiers, each of which is unique to a single record.

params.name: naId_is
params.description: An exact NARA-specific identifier to locate a specific record. This currently functions exactly as naId.

params.name: digitalObjectCount
params.description: Gets a count of Digital Objects

params.name: availableOnline
params.description: Refers to records at the Item and File Unit levels which contain digital objects and can be viewed online

params.name: levelOfDescription
params.description: Describes the NARA-specific hierarchical level in which a record exists.

params.name: personOrOrg
params.description: Refers to the heading of authoity records, or headings of roles in archival descriptions. Results can be either descriptions or authority records.

params.name: dataSource
params.description: Describes the type of record as either a description or an authority.

params.name: typeOfMaterials
params.description: Describes the type(s) of materials associated with an Archival Description

params.name: controlNumbers
params.description:
Specifies an All Control Numbers search string used to search for an archival record and returns Archival Descriptions that contain the keywords in one of the following fields:

* record.accessionNumbers.keyword
* record.localIdentifier.keyword
* record.importRecordControlNumber.keyword
* record.internalTransferNumbers.keyword
* record.naId
* record.recordsCenterTransferNumbers.keyword
* record.variantControlNumbers.number.keyword
* record.microformPublications.identifier.keyword

params.name: localIdentifier
params.description: A search query string used to search on record.localIdentifier.keyword and returns Archival Descriptions that contain the keywords in the Local Identifier field.

params.name: localIdentifier_is
params.description: Specifies an exact, full Local Identifier associated with an archival record and returns an Archival Description which contain this ID.

params.name: microformPublicationsIdentifier
params.description: A search query string used to search on record.microformPublications.identifier.keyword and returns Archival Descriptions that contain the keywords in the Microform Publication Identifier field.

params.name: microformPublicationsIdentifier_is
params.description: Specifies an exact, full Microform Publications Identifier associated with an archival record and returns an Archival Description which contain this ID.

params.name: variantControlNumber_is
params.description: Specifies an exact, full Variant Control Number associated with an archival record and returns an Archival Description which contain this Variant Control Number.

params.name: variantControlType
params.description: Specifies an type of Variant Control Number associated with archival record(s), and returns all Archival Descriptions which contain a Variant Control Type with these keywords.

params.name: variantControlType_is
params.description: Specifies an exact type of Variant Control Number associated with archival record(s) and returns all Archival Descriptions which contain this exact Variant Control Type.

params.name: controlGroup
params.description: Specifies a Control Group number associated with an archival record and returns an Archival Description or Archival Descriptions within this Control Group.

params.name: collectionIdentifier
params.description: A parameter which searches records against the record.collectionIdentifier and record.ancestors.collectionIdentifier fields.

params.name: recordGroupNumber
params.description: A parameter which searches records against the record.recordGroupNumber and record.ancestors.recordGroupNumber fields.

params.name: creators
params.value: Department of Defense. Department of the Navy. Naval Photographic Center. (12/1/1959 - ca. 1998)
params.description: A parameter which searches records against the record.creators.heading fields.

params.name: objectType
params.description: A parameter which searches records against the record.digitalObjects.objectType field. Accepts multiple values separated by commas.

params.name: referenceUnits
params.value: National Archives at College Park - Motion Pictures
params.description: A parameter which searches records against the record.physicalOccurrences.referenceUnits.name fields. Accepts multiple values separated by commas.

params.name: geographicReference
params.description: A parameter which searches records against the record.subjects.heading fields where the record.subjects.authorityType field is equal to geographicPlaceName.

params.name: ancestorNaId
params.description: Specifies the naId of an ancestor object in the hierarchy, by which to limit the search

params.name: debug
params.description: Turns on debug mode, showing metadata in the response body, if set to true.

params.name: abbreviated
params.description: Abbreviated results flag, which when true, returns a shorter version of the results.

params.name: startDate
params.description:
Date representing the start date of a range of dates. Must be in YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM, or YYYY format and must be in the same format as endDate parameter, if one is provided.
Only ancestors with levelOfDescription as 'series' will have their date fields searched.

Searches the following date fields:
* record.productionDates.logicalDate
* record.copyrightDates.logicalDate
* record.releaseDates.logicalDate
* record.broadcastDates.logicalDate
* record.coverageStartDate.logicalDate
* record.coverageEndDate.logicalDate
* record.inclusiveStartDate.logicalDate
* record.inclusiveEndDate.logicalDate
* record.ancestors.inclusiveStartDate.logicalDate
* record.ancestors.inclusiveEndDate.logicalDate

params.name: endDate
params.description:
Date representing the end date of a range of dates. Must be in YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM, or YYYY format and must be in the same format as startDate parameter, if one is provided.
Only ancestors with levelOfDescription as 'series' will have their date fields searched.

Searches the following date fields:
* record.productionDates.logicalDate
* record.copyrightDates.logicalDate
* record.releaseDates.logicalDate
* record.broadcastDates.logicalDate
* record.coverageStartDate.logicalDate
* record.coverageEndDate.logicalDate
* record.inclusiveStartDate.logicalDate
* record.inclusiveEndDate.logicalDate
* record.ancestors.inclusiveStartDate.logicalDate
* record.ancestors.inclusiveEndDate.logicalDate

params.name: fieldName_exists
params.description: A parameter specifying any field name in the form of [fieldName]_exists where, when equal to true, returns results where that field exists with non-null data. If false, returns results where the field does not exist. Accepts nested fields at any level, for example `ancestors.inclusiveEndDate_exists=true`

params.name: contributions_exist
params.description: When equal to true, returns results which have contributions. If false, returns results which do not have any contributions.

params.name: tags_exist
params.description: When equal to true, returns results which have tags. If false, returns results which do not have any tags.

params.name: transcriptions_exist
params.description: When equal to true, returns results which have transcriptions. If false, returns results which do not have any transcriptions.

params.name: comments_exist
params.description: When equal to true, returns results which have comments. If false, returns results which do not have any comments.

params.name: exactDate
params.description:
A single date. Must be in YYYY-MM-DD format.  Cannot be used with other date search parameters.  Used to search for records with dates that match exactly or that match the year and month but do not have a day
Only ancestors with levelOfDescription as 'series' will have their date fields searched.

Searches the following date fields:
* record.productionDates
* record.copyrightDates
* record.releaseDates
* record.broadcastDates
* record.coverageStartDate
* record.coverageEndDate
* record.inclusiveStartDate
* record.inclusiveEndDate
* record.ancestors.inclusiveStartDate
* record.ancestors.inclusiveEndDate

params.name: fieldName_is_not
params.description: A parameter specifying any field name in the form of [fieldName]_is_not where, when equal to the given value, will be excluded from the search results. Including nonexistent/invalid fields will return an appropriate error response.

params.name: recurringDateDay
params.description:
A day in DD format. Often used with recurringDateMonth. Used to search for records with date fields that match the day, regardless of the year.
Only ancestors with levelOfDescription as 'series' will have their date fields searched.

Searches the following date fields:
* record.productionDates.day
* record.copyrightDates.day
* record.releaseDates.day
* record.broadcastDates.day
* record.coverageStartDate.day
* record.coverageEndDate.day
* record.inclusiveStartDate.day
* record.inclusiveEndDate.day
* record.ancestors.inclusiveStartDate.day
* record.ancestors.inclusiveEndDate.day

params.name: recurringDateMonth
params.description:
A month in MM format. Often used with recurringDateDay. Used to search for recorrds with date fields that match the month, regardless of the year.
Only ancestors with levelOfDescription as 'series' will have their date fields searched.

Searches the following date fields
* record.productionDates.month
* record.copyrightDates.month
* record.releaseDates.month
* record.broadcastDates.month
* record.coverageStartDate.month
* record.coverageEndDate.month
* record.inclusiveStartDate.month
* record.inclusiveEndDate.month
* record.ancestors.inclusiveStartDate.month
* record.ancestors.inclusiveEndDate.month

params.name: beginCongress
params.description: Filters search results to just those from this congress or later. Based on `record.beginCongress` field.

params.name: endCongress
params.description: Filters search results to just those from this congress or earlier. Based on `record.endCongress` field.

params.name: congressNumber
params.description: Filters search results to whose range of congresses includes this value. Based on `record.beginCongress` and `record.endCongress`. Cannot be used with other congress parameters.

params.name: tagContribution
params.description: A search query string which accepts boolean operators (AND, OR, NOT), wildcards (*), and exact phrases ("") and searches for a tag contribution.

params.name: commentContribution
params.description: A search query string which accepts boolean operators (AND, OR, NOT), wildcards (*), and exact phrases ("") and searches for a comment contribution.

params.name: transcriptionContribution
params.description: A search query string which accepts boolean operators (AND, OR, NOT), wildcards (*), and exact phrases ("") and searches for a transcription contribution.

params.name: extractedTextContribution
params.description: A contribution search string used to search for a record. Matches the otherExtractedText.contribution or extractedText fields within digitalObjects.

params.name: includeExtractedText
params.description: Allows for the inclusion of OCR text extracted from the digital object in `record.digitalObjects.extractedText` to be included in the response if any exists. Defaults to false.

params.name: includeOtherExtractedText
params.description: Allows for the inclusion of other extracted text contributed by NARA partners in `record.digitalObjects.otherExtractedText` to be included in the response if any exists. Defaults to false.

params.name: ingestTimeStart
params.description:
The ingestTimeStart parameter specifies the date or timestamp for fetching data.

Date only format: YYYY-MM-DD
    When provided in this format, the time defaults to 00:00:00.000000.
    Example: 2025-01-13 → interpreted as 2025-01-13 00:00:00.000000

 Full timestamp format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss.SSSSSS
     When provided in this format, data will be fetched for the exact timestamp specified.
     Example: 2025-01-13 14:30:15.123456 → data fetched at this precise datetime

Behavior:
   If both ingestTimeStart and ingestTimeEnd are provided, description records within that date/time range are retrieved.
   If only ingestTimeStart is provided, description records on and after that date/time are retrieved.
   If only ingestTimeEnd is provided, description records on and before that date/time are retrieved.

params.name: ingestTimeEnd
params.description:
The ingestTimeEnd parameter specifies the date or timestamp for fetching data.

Date only format: YYYY-MM-DD
    When provided in this format, the time defaults to 23:59:59.999999
    Example: 2025-01-13 → interpreted as 2025-01-13 23:59:59.999999

 Full timestamp format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss.SSSSSS
     When provided in this format, data will be fetched for the exact timestamp specified.
     Example: 2025-01-13 14:30:15.123456 → data fetched at this precise datetime

Behavior:
   If both ingestTimeStart and ingestTimeEnd are provided, description records within that date/time range are retrieved.
   If only ingestTimeStart is provided, description records on and after that date/time are retrieved.
   If only ingestTimeEnd is provided, description records on and before that date/time are retrieved.

items.docs: Get records by using url parameters to perform a catalog search. Returns a JSON result.

info.name: Contributions
Get contribution data directly from the database.

params.name: userId
params.description: Contributor's unique identifier which maps to the record.contributor.userId field

params.name: status
params.description: Contribution's status which maps to the status field in the MySQL database

params.name: contributionType
params.description: Contribution type which maps to the contributionType field in the MySQL database

params.name: targetNaId
params.description: Contribution's target record's unique identifier which maps to the targetNaId field in the MySQL database

params.name: createdAt
params.description: Contribution's date of creation by which to filter

params.name: updatedAt
params.description: Contribution's date of modification by which to filter

params.name: sortBy
params.description:
Sort order:
 * `contribution.asc` - Sort by contribution, ascending from A to Z
 * `contribution.desc` - Sort by contribution, descending from Z to A
 * `createdAt.asc` - Sort by created date, ascending
 * `createdAt.desc` - Sort by created date, descending
 * `updatedAt.asc` - Sort by updated date, ascending
 * `updatedAt.desc` - Sort by updated date, descending
 * `count.asc` - Sort by aggregated tag counts, ascending, ONLY works when contributionType = tag is present
 * `count.desc` - Sort by aggregated tag counts, descending, ONLY works when contributionType = tag is present

params.name: includeTotalCount
params.description: Returns the total count of results in each result.

info.name: Get search results for contributions data by sending a request with search parameters to the catalog.

params.name: q
params.description: A search query string which accepts boolean operators (AND, OR, NOT), wildcards (*), and exact phrases ("").

params.name: id
params.description: An individual contribution's unique identifier which maps to the record.contributionId field

params.name: userName
params.description: Contributor's screen name which maps to the record.contributor.userName field

params.name: userId
params.description: Contributor's unique identifier which maps to the record.contributor.userId field

params.name: naId
params.description: An array of NARA-specific identifiers, each of which is unique to a single record.

params.name: debug
params.description: Turns on debug mode, showing metadata in the response body, if set to true.

params.name: searchAfter
params.description:
Enables deep pagination to retrieve records beyond the first 10,000 results.  Not compatible with sort, or page parameters.

For the inital request use `searchAfter=*` and for all subsequent requests set `searchAfter` to the value of the sort array in the last member of `body.hits.hits` for each page.

info.name: Statistics
Retrieve statistics related to user contributions.

items.docs: Fetches aggregated statistics for different contribution types (e.g., comments, tags, transcriptions) across various record types (e.g., authorityRecords, digitalObjects, descriptions). The results include a breakdown by contribution type and grand totals.

info.name: Utilities
Fetch JSON data from S3 based on a provided URL.

items.docs: This endpoint receives an S3 URL pointing to a resource, modifies the URL to target a JSON file instead of an image, and returns the content of the JSON file.

info.name: Recieve the users notifications.

params.name: userId
params.description: userId of the user recieving notifications.

params.name: countOnly
params.description: Recieve only the count of notifications, and none of the contributions.

params.name: date
params.description: Recieve only the notifications past a certain date. Date must be in YYYY-MM-DD format.

params.name: limit
params.description: Limit the amount of returned notifications.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number for pagination of notifications. Page size is denoted by limit, defaults to 5. For example, if page = 3 notifications 10-14 will be returned.

items.docs: Recieve the users notifications, including edited transcriptions, moderated contributions, and replies to comments. Notifications are contributions, with an additional field 'notificationType' to denote type.
